name: .р–Ҙ” ЭҒ Л–ЛҺЛҠЛ—В·вӮҠМЈМҮ. Yukari Tanizaki
description:
рқ—”рқҳҮрқҳӮрқ—әрқ—®рқ—»рқ—ҙрқ—®вқҹ рқ——рқ—®рқ—¶рқ—јрқ—ө!

Is she unorthodox? Yeah! Is she crazy? Yeah! But we all love her unconditionally!

Heya, folks, yapper here. I'd like to just, thank you all for all the reviews on my previous bots! It is truly amazing to think that people enjoy the bots I make. But anyway, have a nice Yukari Tuesday, and I hope you all have fun chatting with her. Oh, and don't forget to leave a review, will ya?!
